transcript: Speaker A: Bro... your pronunciation is terrible. Speaker B: ನಮ್ಮ cockroach colony ಅಲ್ಲಿ English ಮಾತಾಡೋನು ನೀನೇನಾ?! [Are you the only one speaking English in our cockroach colony?!] Speaker A: Yes brother, I evolved. Speaker B: ಹೇಗೆ? [How?] Speaker A: ಈ ಮನೆ uncle ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ MySivi app ನಲ್ಲಿ English practice ಮಾಡ್ತಾರೆ. ನಾನು ಫ್ರಿಡ್ಜ್ ಹಿಂದೆನೇ ಕುಳಿತು full lessons ಕೇಳ್ತಿದ್ದೆ. [The uncle of this house practices English on MySivi app every day. I sat behind the fridge and listened to the full lessons.] Speaker B: ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಈಗ full style ಆಗಿ English ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ? [Is that why you speak English in full style now?] Speaker A: Yes bro, a little bit. Speaker B: ಇವತ್ತಿನಿಂದ cockroach party president ನೀನೇ ಗುರು! [From today, you are the cockroach party president, guru!] Speaker A: Thank you, thank you. Speaker B: ನೀವೂ English ಕಲಿಯಿರಿ. MySivi download ಮಾಡಿ. ಬರಿ 1 rupee trial ಇಂದ ಶುರು ಮಾಡಿ. [You also learn English. Download MySivi. Start with just a 1 rupee trial.] Speaker C: Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: "BRO... YOUR PRONUNCIATION IS TERRIBLE." "ನಮ್ಮ COCKROACH COLONY ALLI ENGLISH ಮಾತಾಡೋನು ನೀನೇನಾ?!" [Are you the only one speaking English in our cockroach colony?!] "YES BROTHER I EVOLVED." "ಹೇಗೆ?" [How?] "MySivi APP ನಲ್ಲಿ ENGLISH" [English on MySivi App] "ಫ್ರಿಡ್ಜ್ ಹಿಂದೆ" [Behind the fridge] "FULL LESSONS" "ಅದಕ್ಕೆ ಈಗ" [That's why now] "FULL STYLE ಆಗಿ" [In full style] "ENGLISH ಮಾತಾಡ್ತಿದೀಯಾ?" [Are you speaking English?] "YES BRO, A LITTLE BIT." "ಇವತ್ತಿನಿಂದ" [From today] "COCKROACH PARTY" "PRESIDENT ನೀನೇ" [You are the president] "ಗುರು!" [Guru!] "THANK YOU, THANK YOU." "DOWNLOAD ಮಾಡಿ" [Download] "1 RUPEE" "MySivi English speaking app Install Now"
summary: An AI-animated skit featuring two cockroaches discussing how one learned fluent English by eavesdropping on a human practicing with the MySivi app. The ad promotes the app's effectiveness and encourages users to download it for a 1-rupee trial.
